Headline: O'Hare-bound Blue Line Service Delayed near O'Hare
ShortDescription: O'Hare-bound Blue Line trains are standing near O'Hare due to a track switching problem. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
O'Hare-bound Blue Line trains are standing near O'Hare due to a track switching problem. 

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#88 Higgins

#90 Harlem

#56 Milwaukee

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
